name: hologres-query-optimizer
description: Hologres Query Execution Plan Analyzer and Optimizer. Use for analyzing SQL performance issues, understanding EXPLAIN/EXPLAIN ANALYZE output, interpreting query operators, and providing optimization recommendations for Hologres queries. Triggers: "hologres explain", "query plan", "execution plan", "sql optimization", "query performance", "hologres performance", "slow query", "query optimizer", "explain analyze"
